message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor "Webブラウザ" as browser1
participant "CCM GUI\n(Web)" as web
participant "CCM GUI\n(WebSocket)" as websocket
participant "CCM SDK\n(IPC)" as sdk
actor "Webブラウザ" as browser2

note right of sdk
ネットワーク情報変更通知 受信
(RegistRecieveNetworkInfoHandler)
end note

sdk -> sdk

sdk <--[ websocket : ネットワーク情報変更通知 [notify]

note left of websocket
{
  "command": "NetworkInfo",
  "type": "notify",
  "data": {
    "ID": "xxx",
    "CellularInfo": [{
      "SignalStrength": "...",
      "SignalStrengthUnit": "...",
      "Operator": "...",
      "PLMN": "...",
      "Band": "...",
      "CellID": "...",
      "AirInterface": "...",
      "Manufacture": "...",
      "ModelName": "...",
      "IMEI": "..."
    }],
    "QosInterfaceType": {
      "key1": "val1",
      ...
    }
  }
}
end note

browser1 <--[ web : 1秒間隔で保持データを画面に表示

@enduml
```
